actionUnits.condition: Object has a BoxCollider (IsTrigger: 0) so a Trigger action is permitted, but the attached Fire MonoBehaviour (component fileID: 2592690533154406537, script GUID: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) exposes no public parameterless methods. Core behaviors (turn on via neighbors, turn off via WaterHit, UpdateFireState notifications) require either neighbor fires becoming active (onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold) or external water system calling WaterHit(Vector3). No UnityEvent m_Calls were provided in scene meta for this object.
